title: Opening for Financial Analyst at State Bank of India

jsonLd.title: Opening for Financial Analyst at State Bank of India
jsonLd.description:
State Bank of India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Financial Analyst at our Gwalior location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About State Bank of India:
State Bank of India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with State Bank of India!
